title: Proclamation No. 769, s. 1941
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 769

RESERVING FOR SCHOOL PURPOSES ONE PARCEL OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE BARRIO OF SAGPAT, MUNICIPAL DISTRICT OF KIBUNGAN, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE (SUBPROVINCE OF BENGUET), ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, as amended, I hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for school purposes, under the administration of the Director of Education, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following, parcel of the public domain, situated in the barrio of Sagpat, municipal district of Kibungan, Mountain Province (subprovince of Benguet), Island of Luzon, and particularly described on Bureau of Lands plan Psu-105376, to wit:

Psu-105376. —A parcel of land (described on Bureau of Lands plan Psu-105376, G. L. R. O. Record No.         ), situated in the barrio of Sagpat, municipal district of Kibungan, Mountain Province (subprovince of Benguet). Bounded on the N., NE., SE., SW., and NW. by public land. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being S. 12° 10′ E., 3,812.67 m., more or less from B. L. L. M. No. 1, municipal district of Kibungan, thence S. 5° 16′ E., 49.15 m. to point 2; thence S. 50° 04′ W., 182.41 m. to point 3; thence N. 26° 05′ W., 114.91 m. to point 4; thence N. 39° 31′ E., 92.44 m. to point 5; thence S. 86° 10′ E., 127.34 m. to the point of beginning; containing an area of nineteen thousand six hundred forty-five (19,645) square meters, more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, points 1 and 3 are marked by G. I. S. on X on pine trees, 50 cm. diameter; point 2, by G. I. S. on X on pine tree, 60 cm. diameter; point 4, by G. I. S- on X on pine tree, 15 cm. diameter; and point 5, by G. I. S. on X on pine tree, 1 m. diameter; bearings true; declination, 1° 30′ E.; date of survey, June 25-26, 1938, and that of the approval, September 10, 1938.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this twenty-second day of October, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and forty-one, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the sixth.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source: University of the Philippines, College of Law Library
